issues.issue_description: Your endpoint is not encrypted at rest!
issues.agent_last_action: Evidence insufficient. Re-request email sent. Missing: Evidence that BitLocker or any other encryption method is actively enabled and encrypting the endpoint's storage at rest.
issues.agent_reasoning: The vendor provided a PowerShell screenshot showing BitLocker is installed, but the output explicitly states 'Protection Status: Protection Off' and 'Percentage Encrypted: 0.0%', indicating the endpoint is NOT encrypted.
issues.missing: Evidence that BitLocker or any other encryption method is actively enabled and encrypting the endpoint's storage at rest.

audit_trail.action: Issue created via dashboard. Agent will send remediation email on next cycle.
Remediation request email sent to viditg@uw.edu
Vendor reply received from Vidit Gupta <viditg@uw.edu>. Evidence extracted.

Gemini evaluation complete. Decision: INSUFFICIENT. Missing: Evidence that BitLocker or any other encryption method is actively enabled and encrypting the endpoint's storage at rest.. Scores: R=95, M=10, S=10
Re-request email sent to viditg@uw.edu. Awaiting revised evidence.
